nasb.text: He found a fresh jawbone of a donkey, so he reached out and took it and killed a thousand men with it.

esv.text: And he found a fresh jawbone of a donkey, and put out his hand and took it, and with it he struck 1,000 men.

cnv.text: 他找著一塊新鮮的驢腮骨，就伸手拾起來，擊殺了一千人。

ccb.text: 他看到一块还没有干的驴腮骨，就捡起来用它杀了一千个非利士人。
